problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
